Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
39

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
9th bhava :
A strong 4th lord in paribhraman, 9th makes one travel to foreign countries, benefits from mother,
gets material wealth during this period. On the contrary if the 4th lord is weak & is a malefic then
there is trouble for the mother and it is a period of failures, brings bad luck and fears about one’s
luck.
10th bhava :
4th lord in the paribhraman 10th well associated brings success in trade, business and earnings,
profits from father or elders.
